channel.title: Failover on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Failover on ivomarino.com

item.title: Out-of-Band SSH Tunnel Failover: Why Stability Beats Speed
item.description: Building reliable automatic gateway failover for critical infrastructure recovery access. How naive health checks broke everything, and why a 30-second stable recovery is better than a 5-second flapping failover.

item.title: OpenBSD CARP Firewalls in Front of a Private Kubernetes Cluster
item.description: We run two OpenBSD firewalls in CARP HA mode in front of a private Kubernetes cluster. Sub-second failover, full state sync, and pf rules that load-balance across worker nodes.
